title: Fathers Christmas Day Novelty Storage Tin for Dad's Tools with Handle, Lunch Box, Man Draw or Tool Stroage For Xmas - Stocking Filler Idea For Him Hamper (Red)
features: DIMENSIONS: Give your dad the perfect practical gift with this charming storage tin designed specifically for organising tools and bits and bobs. This versatile storage solution features a robust clip lock clasp for secure closure and a sturdy carrying handle, making it ideal for both storage and transport. Generous storage space measuring 24cm width x 11.5cm height x 10.5cm depth, perfect for storing tools and other items

SECURE CLOSURE: Features a reliable clip lock clasp fastening system to keep contents safely stored. Measuring 24cm in width, 11.5cm in height, and 10.5cm in depth, it's perfectly sized for storing various items, from DIY essentials to workshop supplies.

PORTABLE DESIGN: Available in two delightful designs - 'Dad's Tools' and 'Dad's Man Tin' - each tin adds a touch of personality to everyday storage. Sturdy built-in handle makes it convenient to carry and transport your items

VERSATILE STORAGE: Suitable for various storage purposes beyond tools, including lunch items or general storage needs.The tin's practical dimensions also make it suitable as a lunch box or for organising items in dad's man drawer. Built with durability in mind, this stylish storage tin combines functionality with a thoughtful themed design that will bring a smile to dad's face while helping him keep his belongings organised and secure.
STYLISH APPEARANCE: Available in two distinctive designs - 'Dad's Tools' and 'Dad's Man Tin' with attractive themed prints
